title: ExecutionSessionRequest
description: Schema for an M58 Execution Session Request artifact. Does not open a session. Does not authorize execution. Does not approve task completion. Does not verify execution result. Does not mutate lifecycle state.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution session request.

task_id.description: The task this execution session request refers to.

created_at.description: Timestamp or date when the request was created.

created_by.description: Creator identifier. Metadata only. Must not be treated as approval.

source_task_path.description: Path to the task artifact being requested for controlled execution.

m57_completion_review_path.description: Must reference the M57 completion review.

m58_intake_report_path.description: Must reference the M58 intake report.

m58_architecture_path.description: Must reference the M58 architecture document.

authorization_status.description: Reflects the M57 authorization result. Must not invent authorization.

requested_execution_mode.description: Requested execution mode. Does not grant permission.

scope_expansion_allowed.description: Must be false unless a future human checkpoint explicitly allows expansion.

requested_write_paths.description: Requested write paths. May be empty only for READ_ONLY_VALIDATION.

allowed.description: Explicit list of allowed command categories or commands.

expected_outputs.description: Expected M58 session outputs or records. Must not claim task completion.

expected_validation_evidence.description: Evidence expected to be passed to M59. Must not claim validation has already passed.

handoff_to_m59_required.description: Must be true. No request may set this to false.

non_authority_acknowledgement.description: Must include required non-authority acknowledgement text.
